explanation: 一般过去时疑问/否定借助 did，动词还原原形（bought → buy）。

answers: He bought a new car last week.
Did he buy a new car last week?
He did not buy a new car last week.
He didn't buy a new car last week.

steps.prompt: 对「a new car」提问（问"买了什么"）
answers: What did he buy last week?
When did he buy a new car?
When did he buy the new car?

explanation: 现在完成时转换只动 has：疑问句 has 提前，否定句 has 后加 not。

answers: She has finished her homework.
She's finished her homework.
She has already finished her homework.
Has she finished her homework?
Has she finished her homework yet?
She has not finished her homework.
She hasn't finished her homework.
She has not finished her homework yet.
She hasn't finished her homework yet.

steps.prompt: 对「her homework」提问（问"完成了什么"）
answers: What has she finished?

cn: 他当时正在看一份报纸。
explanation: 过去进行时转换只动 was；"当时在做什么"用 What was he doing?

answers: He was reading a newspaper.
He was reading a newspaper at that time.
He was reading a newspaper then.
Was he reading a newspaper?
Was he reading a newspaper at that time?
He was not reading a newspaper.
He wasn't reading a newspaper.

steps.prompt: 对「reading a newspaper」提问（问"当时在做什么"）
answers: What was he doing?
What was he doing at that time?
What was he doing then?

steps.prompt: 对「a newspaper」提问（问"在看什么"）
answers: What was he reading?

explanation: have/has been to 表示"去过"；对地点提问用 Where has he been?

answers: He has been to Paris.
He's been to Paris.
Has he been to Paris?
Has he ever been to Paris?
He has not been to Paris.
He hasn't been to Paris.
He has never been to Paris.
Where has he been?

explanation: will 转换不借助 do：疑问句 will 提前，否定句 will not（won't）。

answers: She will attend the meeting tomorrow.
She'll attend the meeting tomorrow.
Will she attend the meeting tomorrow?
She will not attend the meeting tomorrow.
She won't attend the meeting tomorrow.

steps.prompt: 对「the meeting」提问（问"参加什么"）
answers: What will she attend tomorrow?
When will she attend the meeting?

explanation: 被动语态转换只动 be（was）；问时间 When was the bridge built?，对主语提问用 What。

steps.prompt: 翻译成英文（用被动语态）
answers: The bridge was built in 1960.
Was the bridge built in 1960?
The bridge was not built in 1960.
The bridge wasn't built in 1960.
When was the bridge built?

steps.prompt: 对「The bridge」提问（问"什么被建"）
answers: What was built in 1960?
